column1: font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, ""Segoe UI"", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
Find answers to the most common questions about our services.
<summary class=""faq-question"">What is your return and refund policy?</summary>

We offer a hassle-free 30-day return policy on all unused and unopened items. If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, simply contact our support team to initiate a return. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.
<summary class=""faq-question"">How long does shipping usually take?</summary>

Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days within the continental United States. Expedited shipping options (2-3 business days) and overnight shipping are available at checkout for an additional fee. International shipping times vary by destination but generally take 10-14 business days.
<summary class=""faq-question"">Do I need to create an account to make a purchase?</summary>

No, you can checkout as a guest without creating an account. However, creating an account allows you to track your orders, save your shipping information for faster checkout, and access exclusive member discounts and early access to new products.
<summary class=""faq-question"">What payment methods do you accept?</summary>

We accept all major credit and debit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. We also support digital wallets like Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. For qualifying orders, we offer buy-now-pay-later options through Klarna and Afterpay.
<summary class=""faq-question"">How can I contact customer support?</summary>

Our customer support team is available 24/7. You can reach us via live chat on our website, by emailing support@example.com, or by calling our toll-free number at 1-800-555-0199. We aim to respond to all email inquiries within 24 hours.
